metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Metalwork 10 teaches students to design and create functional and artistic pieces using various metalworking techniques. Students learn about metal properties, hand tools, power equipment, and processes like cutting, shaping, joining, and finishing. They develop precision and craftsmanship while exploring the cultural history of metalwork and creating projects that combine design and technical skill.
metadata.general_description: Elective course focused on metalworking techniques, design, and metal craftsmanship.

big_ideas.statement: Metal has unique properties that determine how it can be shaped, joined, and used in design.
big_ideas.elaboration: Different metals behave differently. Understanding properties like malleability, ductility, and strength allows metalworkers to select materials wisely and work with them effectively.

big_ideas.statement: Metalworking combines technique, safety awareness, and precision to create durable, functional objects.
big_ideas.elaboration: Success in metalwork requires attention to detail, understanding of tools, and careful planning. Safety is paramount when working with heat and machinery.

big_ideas.statement: Metalwork is both a practical skill and an art form that allows for creative expression and cultural connection.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students explore how metalwork traditions vary across cultures and time periods. They learn that metalwork can be purely functional, purely artistic, or beautifully combine both.

big_ideas.statement: Design thinking applied to metalwork results in pieces that are both beautiful and well-suited to their purpose.
big_ideas.elaboration: Through planning, sketching, and iteration, students develop designs that work well. They learn to consider form, function, and finish in their work.

competencies.raw: Design functional and artistic metal pieces
i_can_statements: I can design pieces that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing
I can sketch designs and plan projects
I can adapt designs based on materials and constraints
I can consider user needs in metalwork design
I can choose metals appropriate for designs
I can match techniques to design goals
I can plan sequences of metalworking steps
I can evaluate technique choices

competencies.raw: Explore cultural and historical metalwork traditions
i_can_statements: I can research metalwork traditions from different cultures
I can appreciate and understand historical metalwork
I can create inspired pieces respectfully
I can learn from Indigenous metalwork traditions

competencies.raw: Refine and finish metalwork with quality
i_can_statements: I can finish metal pieces professionally
I can polish, texture, or patina metal
I can add details and embellishments
I can evaluate quality and make improvements

competencies.raw: Use hand tools skillfully and safely

I can work safely with hand tools
I can maintain tools properly
I can operate grinders, polishers, and other equipment safely
I can maintain equipment in good working order
I can troubleshoot equipment issues
I can work safely around hot metal and machinery
I can cut, shape, and form metal accurately
I can join metal using welding, brazing, or other methods
I can file, grind, and finish surfaces
I can execute advanced techniques skillfully
I can plan and execute complex projects
I can manage time and resources effectively
I can troubleshoot problems
I can maintain a safe and organized work area
I can explain properties of different metals
I can understand how heat affects metal
I can apply metallurgical knowledge to work
I can select metals for specific properties
I can understand and apply metalworking processes
I can use welding and joining technologies
I can apply finishing processes
I can use specialized equipment safely
I can use CAD to design metalwork
I can use digital tools for planning
I can explore CNC and fabrication technologies
I can document and communicate designs
I can explore specialized metalworking techniques
I can understand advanced joining and forming methods
I can explore decorative and artistic processes
I can understand industrial metalworking processes
